content:
💡 BloomeeTunes | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified, ad-free music listening experience by combining local music playback with streaming from various online sources through a plugin system.
✨ Key Features: • Ad-Free Experience • Plugins system for music sources • Local Music playback • Karaoke-Style Lyrics • Audio Equalizer
📖 Summary: BloomeeTunes is a cross-platform, ad-free music player built with Flutter and Rust. It allows users to seamlessly stream music from various online sources via a plugin system while also playing local music files. The app offers features like lyrics, an equalizer, and Last.fm scrobbling.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
